name: 短剑（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: Historically a focal point of contention and even regulation, this Italian-style stiletto switchblade knife features a spring-loaded blade that can be deployed almost instantly with the push of a release catch. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 作为历史上舆论乃至法规的讨论焦点，这把配备着弹簧加压刀刃的意大利短剑可以在按下开关的瞬间弹出到位。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
